entries.title: Close remaining acceptance and evidence reconciliation follow-up
entries.summary: Tracks the remaining closeout and verification follow-up for the acceptance and evidence reconciliation initiative.

entries.title: Close remaining command documentation and lookup follow-up
entries.summary: Tracks the remaining closeout and verification follow-up for the command documentation and lookup initiative.

entries.title: Bootstrap the core export hardening follow-up initiative
entries.summary: Create the traced planning chain, acceptance baseline, and bounded implementation task set for the export-hardening follow-up work.

entries.title: Repair command implementation metadata
entries.summary: Publish command-family implementation paths in command metadata instead of pointing every command at the thin root CLI entrypoint.

entries.title: Harden the public export-safe API boundary
entries.summary: Move repo-specific consumers onto repo_ops surfaces and stop advertising repo-specific query, sync, and aggregate validation APIs from top-level export-safe namespaces.

entries.title: Make output-directory sync snapshots dependency-correct
entries.summary: Ensure sync output directories feed later dependent targets from the materialized snapshot instead of stale canonical derived artifacts.

entries.title: Bootstrap the core export readiness and optimization initiative
entries.summary: Creates the initiative's PRD, feature design, implementation plan, acceptance baseline artifacts, open execution tasks, and git workflow standard so export-readiness work can proceed from governed local surfaces.

entries.title: Establish registry-backed CLI authority
entries.summary: Introduce registry-backed CLI command authority so parser wiring, command lookup, and command-surface maintenance no longer depend on one monolithic CLI file and doc-derived machine metadata.

entries.title: Publish generic pack-facing interfaces
entries.summary: Add generic pack-facing schemas, examples, and validation hooks for work-item notes, extraction outputs, promoted knowledge, promotion records, and pack indexes without starting domain-pack implementation.

entries.title: Isolate repo-ops from reusable core
entries.summary: Move repository-specific query, sync, validation, and planning-document semantics into explicit repo-ops surfaces so reusable layers stop depending on WatchTowerPlan-only behavior.

entries.title: Add retrieval metadata and coordination slice orchestration
entries.summary: Extend retrieval indexes with stronger authority hints and add a deterministic coordination rebuild slice for task, traceability, and initiative surfaces.

entries.title: Replace manual sync and validation enumerations with registries
entries.summary: Introduce governed sync-family and validation-family registries so orchestration, listing, and coverage checks no longer depend on duplicated manual enumerations.

entries.title: Inject workspace config and artifact adapters
entries.summary: Replace implicit repo-root discovery with injected workspace configuration, artifact sources, and artifact stores so reusable services can run against non-WatchTowerPlan layouts.

entries.title: Close out the core Python foundation initiative
entries.summary: Tracks the remaining initiative-level closeout for the core Python foundation slice.

entries.title: Bootstrap the end-to-end repo review and rationalization initiative
entries.summary: Creates the traced planning chain, accepted direction, acceptance baseline, planning evidence, and bounded execution task set for the final pre-implementation review follow-up.

entries.title: Harden derived coordination metadata around closeout state
entries.summary: Make traceability-derived initiative and coordination surfaces keep timestamps aligned with closeout-driven state changes so current-state trackers remain trustworthy.

entries.title: Add documentation guardrails for repo-local link integrity
entries.summary: Extend document-semantics validation so repo-local markdown links fail closed and keep documentation-coherence drift from recurring silently.

entries.title: Expose external pack validation through supplemental schema loading
entries.summary: Add file-system supplemental schema loading and CLI-level external artifact validation so future pack-owned artifacts can be validated without patching the canonical schema catalog.

entries.title: Split query CLI registration and handlers into smaller family modules
entries.summary: Reduce maintenance risk in the largest remaining CLI modules by splitting query parser registration and query runtime handlers into smaller family-focused modules without changing the durable command contract.

entries.title: Bootstrap the foundation scope and entrypoint realignment initiative
entries.summary: Create the traced planning chain, accepted direction, acceptance baseline, planning evidence, and bounded task set for the foundation-scope and root-entrypoint cleanup work.

entries.title: Align foundation scope with current repository boundary
entries.summary: Add an explicit repository-scope foundation and realign the existing foundation layer so current repo truth and future WatchTower product narrative stop competing.

entries.title: Tighten root and planning entrypoint contract
entries.summary: Keep the root as a thin router, point humans and agents at the updated scope guidance, and align top-level entrypoint docs with the clarified foundation boundary.

entries.title: Close remaining GitHub collaboration follow-up
entries.summary: Tracks the remaining closeout and verification follow-up for the GitHub collaboration scaffolding initiative.

entries.title: Close remaining initiative closeout follow-up
entries.summary: Tracks the remaining closeout and verification follow-up for the initiative closeout and planning tracker initiative.

entries.title: Add GitHub task sync support
entries.summary: Adds one-way GitHub sync support so local task records can publish to GitHub issues and project items without changing local task identity.

entries.title: Establish local-first task tracking foundation
entries.summary: Establishes governed local task records, a generated human tracker, a generated machine index, and Python query and sync commands for task coordination.

entries.title: Bootstrap the machine-first coordination surface initiative
entries.summary: Creates the traced planning chain, decision record, acceptance baseline, and bounded execution task set for the coordination-surface follow-up work.

entries.title: Publish the derived coordination index
entries.summary: Add the coordination-index artifact family, sync logic, loader support, and query integration so one machine-readable surface becomes the default planning current-state entrypoint.

entries.title: Align human and agent coordination entrypoints
entries.summary: Generate a compact human coordination tracker and reroute planning and agent entrypoint guidance so humans and agents start from the same derived coordination state.

entries.title: Publish machine authority map and canonical navigation updates
entries.summary: Add the machine authority-map registry, authority query surface, and the documentation and standards updates that explain canonical planning precedence.

entries.title: Bootstrap Planning Authority Unification planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Planning Authority Unification.

entries.title: Publish planning catalog and canonical planning query
entries.summary: Build the planning-catalog artifact family and make it the canonical machine planning join through a dedicated query command.

entries.title: Bootstrap the pre-implementation repo review and hardening initiative
entries.summary: Creates the traced planning chain, decision record, acceptance baseline, and bounded execution task set for the full pre-implementation repository review and hardening pass.

entries.title: Split core monoliths and add supplemental schema loading
entries.summary: Refactor the largest coordination-facing Python modules into smaller family modules and add supplemental schema registration for future external pack-owned artifacts.

entries.title: Strengthen the machine coordination start-here surface
entries.summary: Elevate the initiative index into the explicit machine coordination start-here path for traced work and expose it through clearer query and documentation surfaces.

entries.title: Compact the highest-traffic README entrypoints
entries.summary: Make the most frequently opened README entrypoints compact, high-signal orientation surfaces and tighten the README rules so exhaustive directory dumps do not recur.

entries.title: Bootstrap the template and output efficiency initiative
entries.summary: Create the traced planning chain, acceptance baseline, and bounded task set for compact template and tracker work.

entries.title: Define compact authoring rules and align governed templates
entries.summary: Add the compact-authoring standard, align templates with governed outputs, and relax low-value required sections without weakening machine-readable authority.

entries.title: Compact generated planning tracker outputs
entries.summary: Make generated planning trackers denser and more scan-friendly by removing low-value filler while preserving the routing value of the human-readable view.

entries.title: Tighten workflow guidance for proportional output
entries.summary: Update planning and documentation workflow modules so they prefer the smallest useful output and stop encouraging low-value meta content.

entries.title: Bootstrap Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing.

entries.title: Harden command and lifecycle coverage
entries.summary: Add direct handler and service coverage for closeout, route, plan, task, query, and lifecycle behavior that current CLI smoke tests do not cover deeply enough.

entries.title: Harden GitHub integration and sync coverage
entries.summary: Add direct deterministic unit coverage for GitHub client behavior and GitHub task-sync write or failure paths.

entries.title: Expand orchestration and derivation failure coverage
entries.summary: Add meaningful failure and edge-state tests for aggregate sync, aggregate validation, initiative closeout, and derived coordination or initiative projections.

entries.title: Rebalance unit suite structure and docs
entries.summary: Split the oversized CLI test surface, add shared fixture support, and update unit-suite documentation to match the suite's actual boundary and contributor patterns.

entries.title: Bootstrap the workflow system operationalization initiative
entries.summary: Creates the traced planning chain, accepted direction, acceptance baseline, planning evidence, and bounded execution tasks for the workflow-system follow-up.

entries.title: Add compact planning scaffold commands
entries.summary: Expose lean CLI scaffolds for PRDs, feature designs, implementation plans, decisions, and initiative bootstrap using the current repo templates.

entries.title: Tighten reconciliation workflow decision guidance
entries.summary: Add compact decision support that distinguishes documentation, traceability, governed-artifact, and acceptance-evidence reconciliation routes.

entries.title: Add route preview and governed workflow metadata authority
entries.summary: Move workflow retrieval metadata into governed control-plane artifacts, add a derived route index, and expose executable route preview through the CLI.

entries.title: Add task lifecycle CLI commands
entries.summary: Expose task creation, structured task updates, and handoff-style transitions through a first-class CLI family while preserving task-document authority.
